title: In Albergo
gcseTheme: Theme 2: Local, National, International and Global Areas
scenario: You're checking into a hotel in Italy during a holiday.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Good evening. I have a reservation.

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Sì, una camera doppia. Ecco la chiave.
lines.english: Yes, a double room. Here is the key.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: A che piano è la camera?
lines.english: What floor is the room on?

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Al secondo piano. Camera numero ventidue.

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Sì, è a destra. La camera ha il bagno e la televisione.
lines.english: Yes, it's on the right. The room has a bathroom and television.

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Sì. La colazione è dalle sette alle dieci.
lines.english: Yes. Breakfast is from seven to ten.

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Al primo piano, nella sala grande.
lines.english: First floor, in the big hall.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Is there Wi-Fi in the room?

lines.speaker: receptionist
lines.italian: Sì, la password è sulla scrivania.
lines.english: Yes, the password is on the desk.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Quanto costa la camera per notte?
lines.english: How much is the room per night?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Va bene, grazie. A che ora devo lasciare la camera?
lines.english: OK, thank you. What time must I check out?

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say you have a reservation for two nights?
practicePrompts.answer: Ho una prenotazione per due notti.

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you ask if breakfast is included?
How would you ask how much the room costs?
